ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (0: Female, 1: Male) */,
  "anaemia" INTEGER /* Presence of anaemia (0: No, 1: Yes) */,
  "diabetes" INTEGER /* Presence of diabetes (0: No, 1: Yes) */,
  "high_blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Presence of high blood pressure (0: No, 1: Yes) */,
  "smoking" INTEGER /* Smoking status (0: No, 1: Yes) */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the patient (in kg) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the patient (in cm) */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient (e.g., A, B, AB, O) */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Other medical conditions the patient has */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies the patient has */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Primary contact number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the treatment */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of treatment */,
  "DEATH_EVENT" INTEGER /* Outcome of treatment (0: No event, 1: Death) */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "treatment_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "prescribed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional who prescribed the treatment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the treatment ended */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if follow-up is required (0: No, 1: Yes) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up appointment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the treatment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the treatment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_prescribed_by FOREIGN KEY ("prescribed_by") REFERENCES healthcare_professionals ("hcp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_professionals" (
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare professional */,
  "hcp_name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare professional */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare professional */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the healthcare professional (e.g., doctor, nurse, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the healthcare professional belongs to */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the healthcare professional */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the healthcare professional */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare professional's office */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the healthcare professional record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the healthcare professional record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hcp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "hcp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare professional accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used to access the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from where the data was accessed */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed during the access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_hcp_id FOREIGN KEY ("hcp_id") REFERENCES healthcare_professionals ("hcp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
